## Lane(s)

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] agent / ontology / voice / eval (P1)
- [ ] atak / routing / data / figma (P4)

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally
- [ ] Conventional commit message
- [ ] No secrets, no `.env`, no model weights committed
- [ ] AGENTS.md / lane file consulted before generating code
- [ ] AI PR review completed; HIGH findings addressed or waived (with reason)
- [ ] Cross-lane: paired reviewer tagged
